title: Meditation Riddim
productionNotes: Build around authentic Nyabinghi hand drums (bass, funde, repeater) with heavy reverb and delay creating cathedral-like space. Layer ambient pad drones in C major pentatonic, subtle kalimba melodies, and deep sub-bass that pulses like a heartbeat. Use field recordings of rainfall and wind as texture beneath the drums. Vocals should float in heavy plate reverb, almost becoming another instrument. Minimal compression to preserve dynamic range and organic breathing quality. Allow long spaces between phrases for meditation and reflection.
intro:
[Nyabinghi drums fade in slowly, heartbeat rhythm]
[Ambient pad swells, rainfall texture]
[Deep breath, extended silence]
Inhale... exhale... selah
verse1:
Close yuh eye, feel di earth beneath
Ancestor whisper through di leaf
Screen dem dark, silence sweet
Inner kingdom where we meet

Breathe inna... breathe out Babylon
Breathe inna... till di fear gone
Breathe inna... hear di ancient song
Breathe out... what nuh belong
chorus:
Meditation riddim, meditation riddim
Wash away di system, cleanse di rhythm
Meditation riddim, meditation riddim
Jah love within, dat's di true kingdom

Om mani... padme hum (Jah Rastafari)
Still di mind... till we become (One with di Most High)
Om mani... peace a come
Meditation riddim
verse2:
Notification cyan reach yah so
Algorithm nuh control di flow
In di stillness, truth a grow
Roots run deep where river slow

Let go... di need fi know
Let go... di ego show
Let go... just feel di glow
Presence here, presence now
bridge:
[Drums drop to bass drum heartbeat only]
[Chanted, almost whispered]

I an I
Sky an earth
Death an birth
Pain an worth

I an I
Dark an light
Wrong an right
Fall an flight

[Drums build back slowly]

Selah, selah, selah...
Jah guide I meditation
Selah, selah, selah...
Through every revelation
outro:
[Chorus refrain, vocals heavily delayed]
Meditation riddim... (echo fades)
Wash away di system... (echo fades)

[Nyabinghi drums continue]
[Rainfall intensifies then fades]
[Single bass drum heartbeat]
[Silence]

[Whispered] Asé
promptForSuno: Nyabinghi dub meditation track, deep Jamaican patois baritone vocal floating over authentic hand drums, 72 BPM, C major ambient drone pads, kalimba accents, heavy reverb and delay creating sacred space, rainfall and wind textures, sub-bass heartbeat pulse, transcendent peaceful energy, mystical Rastafarian chant meets ambient soundscape, organic breathing dynamics, minimal arrangement with maximum space, spiritual cleansing interlude, rootsy percussion with cosmic atmosphere
